findings.evidence: `MarkingSwap.lean:63` defines `swapMarkings` using only `GridDiagram.O`, `GridDiagram.X`, and `GridDiagram.disjoint`; `Diagram.lean:503-523` defines that structure and its marking sets, and `Diagram.lean:788-860` already houses the analogous `transpose` operation and basic `OSet`/`XSet` lemmas.
findings.fix: Move `swapMarkings`, `swapMarkings_O/X`, `swapMarkings_OSet/XSet`, membership simp lemmas, `swapMarkings_swapMarkings`, and `transpose_swapMarkings` to `TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/Diagram.lean` near `GridDiagram.transpose`; keep only the grading consequences in the later file.
findings.issue: `GridDiagram.swapMarkings` and its basic simp/involution/transpose facts are diagram-level API but live in `MarkingSwap.lean`, which imports `GradingInteger`; this forces users of the basic marking exchange to import the full grading stack.

summary: The grading-level material can live in the new symmetry file, but the basic diagram operation is placed too late in the dependency stack.
